heroLead: ThermaSpan's Insulspan® roofing and Panelspan® wall panels work as one integrated building system — engineered to install together with precision, speed, and zero waste.
processH2: From factory to lock-up in days.
processLead: Every ThermaSpan project follows the same precise workflow — custom-engineered panels arrive on site pre-cut, pre-finished and ready to install.

steps.title: Design & engineer
steps.copy: Your project drawings are converted into a precise panel schedule. Every cut, notch, and service penetration is pre-engineered in the factory.

steps.title: Factory fabrication
steps.copy: Panels are cut, finished and bundled to your schedule. Arrive on site pre-labelled and ready for installation in order.

steps.title: Site delivery
steps.copy: Panels are delivered direct to site on flatbed trucks. No specialist cranes or equipment required for residential builds.

steps.title: Install & lock-up
steps.copy: A small crew installs the complete roof and wall envelope. Typical residential projects reach lock-up in 3–4 days.

steps.title: Ready to finish
steps.copy: Pre-finished FC and MgO surfaces are ready for paint or render. No additional cladding, sarking, or lining trades needed.

systemPara1: Used together, Insulspan® roofing and Panelspan® walls create an airtight, pre-finished building envelope that outperforms traditional construction in every metric.
systemPara2: No thermal bridging. No condensation risk. No multiple trades walking over each other's work. Just a precise, factory-engineered system delivered on time.
